---
title: &TITLE Kaden Coulter
last: Coulter
first: Kaden
people_group: gradstudent
education: M.S. Student | University of Oregon
subtitle: M.S. Student, Bioinformatics Graduate Program, University of Oregon
image: avatar.jpeg
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, image, author]
page-layout: full
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpeg
---

<hr>


:::{#about}



## Education
{{< meta education >}}

<br>

:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
